title: Identify shapes
description: Practice identifying quadrilaterals, triangles, and circles.
topic_path: Topic A, B, C, D, & E: Foundations

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following shapes are quadrilaterals?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
##Quadrilateral

A quadrilateral is a [[☃ definition 1]] with $4$ sides.

[[☃ explanation 3]]
Which of the shapes is a polygon with $4$ sides?

The following shapes are quadrilaterals:

 | | 
- | - 
![2 shapes with 4 sides each.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a5e09db3d9cafda1958b09d5a045b7004cb18d7d) | ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b90eca136c57f1a93a5379727c7db1e4ab1d37aa)

![A shape with 4 sides.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/45abf0ad2ab2f34d4934c5d8de39539107e36878)
![A shape with 3 straight sides and 1 curved side.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b6df5d75541f1755dc3667ddc3efe47bcb22fded)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following shapes are squares?**

[[☃ radio 3]]
hints:
##Square

A square is a quadrilateral with $4$ equal side lengths and $4$  [[☃ explanation 2]].

[[☃ explanation 3]]

The following shapes are squares:

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following shapes are circles?**  

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
##Circle

A circle is a curved shape where every part is the same distance from the center of the shape.

[[☃ explanation 2]]
Which of the shapes is a curved shape where every part is the same distance from the center of the shape?

The following shapes are circles:

 | | 
- | - 
![2 shapes. Each shape is round.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ea10248f902b2dd40042e423a0dfc51e8e8df62b) | ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/fac6c40c18fc34cb58651ae06f6a972ff79a7361)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following shapes are rhombuses?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
##Rhombus

A rhombus is a quadrilateral with $4$ equal side lengths.

[[☃ explanation 2]]
Which of the shapes is a quadrilateral with $4$ equal side lengths?

The following shapes are rhombuses:  

 | | 
- | - | -
![A shape with 4 equal sides. 2 pair of sides are parallel.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9688d0481b0e0dccc5da718da701dcdd754cadf8) | ![A shape with 4 equal sides. 2 pair of sides are parallel.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/60156557ea00c6124f227d9213c16f9f8bb66933)
